title: The Prompt is the Platform - Dominik Tornow, Resonate HQ
summary: Dominik Tornow argues that coding agents challenge traditional software engineering by synthesizing bespoke systems on demand rather than relying on general-purpose libraries and frameworks. He discusses where agents succeed and fail, and proposes making the prompt the core platform and specification the product.
writeup: Dominik Tornow of Resonate HQ argues that coding agents change software engineering by synthesizing bespoke systems on demand instead of leaning on general-purpose libraries and frameworks. The talk maps where agents succeed and where they fail, then makes the case for treating the prompt as the core platform and the specification as the product. The central takeaway: spec-driven development reframes what engineers build and ship when agents handle synthesis.
